name: CoreClaw Maps Leads → Sheets + Email Summary / 地图线索→表格+邮件摘要

nodes.name: Input Config / 输入配置
nodes.notes: Edit search params and the email recipient here. / 在此修改搜索参数和邮件收件人。

nodes.name: Run and Get Results / 运行并取结果
Normalize & Score / 标准化与评分
Append Rows to Sheet / 追加到表格
Export Last Run Results (xlsx) / 导出Excel
nodes.notes: Must run right after 'Run and Get Results' — exports the worker's last run. / 必须紧跟在「运行并取结果」之后,导出该 worker 上一轮结果。

nodes.name: Download xlsx / 下载Excel
nodes.notes: Fetches the signed download_url as binary. / 拉取签名直链为二进制附件。

nodes.name: Aggregate rows / 汇总行
nodes.notes: Collects all flattened rows into one item.rows array for the email body. / 把所有扁平化行汇成一个 item.rows,供邮件正文用。

nodes.name: Build Email HTML / 生成邮件正文
Send Summary Email / 发摘要邮件

parameters.subject: =CoreClaw Maps Leads — {{ $('Build Email HTML / 生成邮件正文').item.json.total }} leads ({{ $('Build Email HTML / 生成邮件正文').item.json.withEmail }} with email)
parameters.message: ={{ $('Build Email HTML / 生成邮件正文').item.json.html }}

parameters.content:
## CoreClaw Maps Leads → Sheets + Email Summary

Runs `google-maps-scraper` (v2 Run and Get Results), flattens + scores rows, then in parallel: writes every row to Google Sheets, exports the run as xlsx, downloads it, and emails an HTML summary (Top 10 table + stats) with the xlsx attached.

## 地图线索→表格+邮件摘要

跑 gmaps worker,扁平化+评分,并行三路:每行写 Google Sheets、导出 xlsx、发带附件的 HTML 摘要邮件(Top10 表+统计)。

After **Normalize & Score** the rows fan out:

1. ↓ Append to Google Sheets (every row)
2. → Export Last Run Results (xlsx) → Download → Merge
3. ↓ Aggregate → Build Email HTML → Merge → Gmail

**Export Last Run Results** must be the very next worker run after **Run and Get Results**, or the export may point to a different run.

## 分支
扁平化后分三路:写表 / 导出下载 / 汇总发邮件。导出节点必须紧贴运行节点。

Bind three credentials (see docs/google-oauth-setup.md):
- CoreClaw API → Run + Export nodes
- Google Sheets OAuth2 → Append node
- Gmail OAuth2 → Send Email node

## 三套凭证
CoreClaw API、Google Sheets OAuth2、Gmail OAuth2。

main.node: Run and Get Results / 运行并取结果
